Dictionary lookup test

Long-press each word; the gloss is on the line below it.

水

= water

火

= fire

山

= mountain

河

= river

木

= tree, wood

人

= person

狗

= dog

猫

= cat

鱼

= fish

鸟

= bird

花

= flower

天

= sky, day

海

= sea

月

= moon, month

日

= sun, day

星

= star

雨

= rain

雪

= snow

风

= wind

云

= cloud

书

= book

车

= car

家

= home, family

学校

= school

老师

= teacher

学生

= student

朋友

= friend

母亲

= mother

父亲

= father

孩子

= child

爱

= love

吃

= to eat

喝

= to drink

看

= to see

听

= to listen

说

= to speak

读

= to read

写

= to write

去

= to go

来

= to come

中国

= China

北京

= Beijing

上海

= Shanghai

大

= big

小

= small

好

= good

红

= red

白

= white

一

= one

二

= two

三

= three
